name: Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc.
business: Slide Insurance Holdings, Inc. is a technology-enabled, fast-growing, coastal specialty insurer that focuses on profitable underwriting of single family, condominium and commercial residential policies in the property and casualty industry in coastal states along the Atlantic seaboard. The company utilizes differentiated technology and a data-driven approach to focus on market opportunities underserved by other insurance companies. It acquires policies from inorganic block acquisitions and subsequent renewals, as well as new business sales through independent agents and a direct-to-consumer channel.

exposures.sentence: We focus on profitable underwriting of single family, condominium and commercial residential policies in the property and casualty (P&C) industry in coastal states along the Atlantic seaboard through our insurance subsidiary, Slide Insurance Company (SIC).
